introSection:
Raggamuffin is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Mystic Mountain in Ocho Rios, Saint Ann, Jamaica.

It opened in July 2020 when the park reopened after the COVID-19 pandemic.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is a Mystical Hex model built by Wiegand.

fullText:
Raggamuffin is a steel suspended roller coaster located at Mystic Mountain in Ocho Rios, Saint Ann, Jamaica.

It opened in July 2020 when the park reopened after the COVID-19 pandemic.

The ride is a Mystical Hex model built by Wiegand.
